title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness Training Improves Attention: Evidence from Behavioral and Event-rela

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Mindfulness, Training, Improves, Attention:, Evidence.

**Mindfulness Training Improves Attention: Evidence from Behavioral and Event-related Potential Analyses.** — Brain Topogr. PMID: 36697933. DOI: 10.1007/s10548-023-00938-z. Mindfulness meditation helps to improve attentional capacity. However, the neural correlates that indicate the mechanism through which mindfulness improves attention are unclear. To address this gap, we aimed to assess the effects of mindfulness training on sustained attentional capacity. Event-related potentials (ERPs) associated with the modified sustained attention response task (mSART) were used in this study.
